name: Reinvent Technology Partners (SPAC)
description: Reinvent Technology Partners is a blank check company, or special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed by LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman and Zynga founder Mark Pincus. The company was established for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses, specifically targeting the technology sector. By leveraging the expertise and networks of its founders, the firm aimed to identify and partner with high-growth technology companies to take them public through a business combination, as exemplified by its merger with Joby Aviation.
